CustomField.description: Developer name of the Salesforce email template to use for tracked field change alerts. The template body must include the following placeholders: {_Changes_Table_} — replaced with an HTML table (or a CSV attachment notice) listing all changed fields per record; {_Record_Number_} — replaced with the number of distinct records affected. If this field is blank, no email will be sent even if Send Alert is enabled.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Enter the Developer Name of the email template. Use {_Changes_Table_} in the template body to inject the field changes table, and {_Record_Number_} to show how many records were affected.
CustomField.label: Alert Email Template
